creator: twm@pdp11.pw
text:
Created attachment 256356
update net-im/prosody to 0.12.5

net-im/prosody: update to 0.12.5

 * Update to 0.12.5
 * Update maintainer's e-mail address
 * Remove dependency on lua-bitop (not required with Lua 5.2+)

ChangeLog:

 https://prosody.im/doc/release/0.12.5

QA:

 * portlint: OK (1 warning regarding the use of /var/db)
 * testport: OK (poudriere: 13.4-AMD64/i386, 14.2-AMD64/i386)

This is a maintenance release for the stable 0.12 series.
